import React from 'react'; import { LayoutDashboard, Bell, SlidersHorizontal, Activity, ArrowRight, } from 'lucide-react'; import './HomePage.css'; /** * Landing view for Home — uses existing metrics list for counts and recent names only. */ export default function HomePage({ metrics = [], onOpenDashboards, onNavigate, }) { const recent = metrics.slice(0, 18); const quickItems = [ { id: 'dashboards', label: 'Dashboards', icon: LayoutDashboard }, { id: 'alerts', label: 'Alerts', icon: Bell }, { id: 'settings', label: 'Threshold Settings', icon: SlidersHorizontal }, { id: 'system-status', label: 'System Status', icon: Activity }, ]; return (
